title: Ember Tools
description: ember tools that are direct upgrades to iron tools.
body: In this mod iron tools can be upgraded to ember tools with ember ores that can be found scattered in the overworld. It contains a sword,axe,pickaxe,hoe and shovel. The strongest sword you can get is the firelord sword which shoots fire when right clicked, has infinite fire resistance when in hand and when crafted has a fire aspect of 3. This is a standalone version from the tools that already exist in my other mod called minecraft expansion i just thought maybe some people will want just the ember tools.
